featureDetection.rationale: Checks for presence of the toBase64 and toHex methods on instances of Uint8Array to toggle probe badges.

gracefulFallback.rationale: Includes functional legacy JS routines to generate SRI hashes, preventing breaks in case of CORS or network errors.

genuineInteraction.rationale: Fetches actual script bundles live over the web, processes sha-384 SubtleCrypto operations, and runs comparative performance races in real time.

builderMultipleDemos.rationale: Excellent, end-to-end real-world demonstration of SRI generation.

designSystemContrast.rationale: Adheres to theme variables beautifully with highly readable contrast values.
